message: helper or kfunc argument has the wrong verifier-visible type: R1 type=fp expected=ringbuf_mem
required_proof: pass the helper or kfunc argument register the exact verifier-visible type required by its contract at this call site

evidence.detail: verifier state at the call site confirms the rejected argument register has the printed actual type, while the helper or kfunc contract requires a different verifier-visible type

help: Pass the helper or kfunc the exact verifier-visible argument type it requires; use a real map pointer, stack pointer, packet pointer, ringbuf memory pointer, or trusted object pointer rather than casting or reusing a different pointer class.
